title: Require raw user request and source evidence for code Work Items
outOfScope: Broad multilingual and hidden-risk semantic classification.

sources.reason: Defines the P0 requirement that MODE=code raw requests are required and sourced.
Current Raw Request Guard treats an absent raw request as Not Applicable.
Contract validator is the fail-closed lifecycle entrypoint.
Registered internal governance exemption compatibility coverage.
Recalibrated bounded complexity headroom for the new guard and regression coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: This is a bounded fail-closed entry condition with targeted regression coverage and no production runtime change.

executionDecision.reason: Scope, sources, acceptance, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review the new required-field boundary for fail-closed behavior and exemption abuse.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: MODE=code Work Item Contracts with an active Work Item scope require a non-empty rawUserRequest or an explicit approved exemption.
A present rawUserRequest requires rawRequestSource.type/reference/capturedAt/digest with portable evidence.
Missing, malformed, or incomplete raw-request evidence is fail closed in Contract validation and Preflight.
Non-code contracts and legacy unit fixtures retain compatibility, while Trust Layer documentation states the new boundary.
guidelines: Keep raw-request evidence deterministic, portable, and repository-neutral.
Do not weaken existing unsupported-operation fail-closed behavior.

intent.problem: The current Raw Request Guard returns Not Applicable when a MODE=code Work Item omits rawUserRequest, leaving a structural path back to self-declared intent only.
constraints: Require rawUserRequest for full Contract v2 MODE=code Work Items unless a declared maintenance exemption applies.
Do not add semantic risk classification or broad multilingual coverage in this Work Item.
Keep source evidence portable and never include machine-specific paths.
intent.rationale: A required, sourced raw request closes the omission path before later intent and capability guards evaluate the request.

rawUserRequest: Require a sourced rawUserRequest for MODE=code Work Items, with explicit exemptions only for system maintenance, dependency upgrades, release metadata, and registered internal governance tasks.

declaredIntent.summary: Make code Work Item entry require traceable raw user request evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.approvedBy: user explicit authorization: serial execution through all Work Items
restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized the governed remediation loop, including governance policy calibration.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
